description: Scoped to the hand-vendored asset .VERSION files ONLY (custom.regex); Dependabot still owns Python/uv, GitHub Actions and Docker (.github/dependabot.yml), so the two never touch the same files. Each .VERSION carries a `# renovate:` annotation; on a bump the postUpgradeTask re-downloads + rehashes (and re-applies the OSV ECL- patch) via the allow-listed dev/update_vendored_assets.py.

packageRules.description: Vendored JSON schemas are payload-validated by the publication test suite + the OSV ecosystem drift guard, so a breaking change fails CI — safe to auto-merge on green.
Frontend assets (htmx, ALTCHA widget, Inter, neoteroi CSS) have no behavioral tests — PR for manual smoke, never auto-merge.
